channel.title: SoloTrack Blog
channel.description: Practical writing for student pilots: flight logging, currency tracking, FAR 61.109 progress, and how SoloTrack fits into training.

item.title: What SoloTrack does (and what it does not)
item.description: A clear scope of what SoloTrack is — a focused iOS flight logbook for student pilots — and the things it intentionally is not.

item.title: FAR 61.109 explained: the six requirements every PPL student needs to track
item.description: A plain-English walk-through of the FAA's aeronautical-experience requirements for the private pilot certificate, mapped to how SoloTrack tracks them.

item.title: A privacy-first flight logbook: how SoloTrack handles your data
item.description: Why SoloTrack stores your flight log on-device, how optional iCloud sync works, and what we deliberately do not do with your data.
